login.title: Log In
login.subtitle: Access your account to connect.
login.googleNotAvailable: Google Sign-In is not available in this version

register.title: Create Account
register.fieldsRequired: Please fill in all fields to create your account.
register.passwordMismatch: The passwords you entered don't match. Please check and try again.
register.passwordTooShort: Your password must be at least 6 characters long.
register.registerError: There was a problem creating your account. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a code to recover your access.
forgotPassword.emailRequired: Enter your email address to recover your password.
forgotPassword.invalidEmail: Enter a valid email address (e.g. name@example.com).
forgotPassword.sendFailed: Could not process the request. Check the email and try again.
forgotPassword.noConnection: Could not connect to the server. Check your internet connection and try again.
forgotPassword.checkSpam: Check your spam folder if you can't find it.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter the code you received and your new password.
resetPassword.codeIncomplete: Enter the 6-digit code you received by email.
resetPassword.passwordTooShort: Your new password must be at least 6 characters long.
resetPassword.passwordMismatch: Make sure both passwords are the same.
resetPassword.resetFailed: The code may be incorrect or expired. Request a new one.
resetPassword.noConnection: Could not connect to the server. Check your internet connection and try again.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been changed successfully. You can now log in with your new password.

accountSuspended.title: Account suspended
accountSuspended.description: Your account has been suspended due to a possible violation of TwinPro's terms of use.
accountSuspended.infoText: If you believe this is an error or need more information, please contact our support team.
accountSuspended.emailBody:
Hello,

I would like to get more information about the suspension of my account.

Thank you.
